name: High-throughput exploration of 50,688 Pd-, Ni- and Cu-catalysed C–N coupling reactions
description: 50,688 C–N coupling reactions between 2 amines and 4 aryl halides were studied in a series of ultra-HTE screens using a 1536-well plate format. Catalyst (33 unique), ligand (164 unique), base (17 unique) and temperature were varied across Pd, Ni and Cu catalytic systems in diglyme, DMSO, and binary solvent mixtures. Assay yields were determined by UPLC-MS. Reactions were performed by the Cernak group at the University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, MI, and the publication is available at https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.6c05959.

name: Bayesian optimization of 5 decarboxylative olefination reactions
description: The decarboxylative olefination reaction between 5 pairings of aldehydes and malonic acid half-thioesters were studied in a Bayesian optimization campaign of 120 reaction datapoints. For each pairing, the catalyst, solvent, temperature and equivalents were optimized across 4 rounds of 6 experiments. Reactions were performed by the Alan R. Healy group at New York University Abu Dhabi, and the pre-print publication is available on ChemRxiv at https://doi.org/10.26434/chemrxiv.15001213/v1. This dataset was used as training data for a subsequent transfer learning optimization of similar aldehydes and malonic acid derivatives, which is also available on ORD (ord_dataset-dc0249930af34d17a3c76881a762aebf).

name: Transfer learning optimization of 26 decarboxylative olefination reactions
description: The decarboxylative olefination reaction between 26 pairings of aldehydes and malonic acid derivatives were studied in a transfer learning optimization campaign of 136 reaction datapoints. For each pairing, the catalyst, solvent, temperature and equivalents were optimized across several iterations of 2 experiments. Reactions were performed by the Alan R. Healy group at New York University Abu Dhabi, and the pre-print publication is available on ChemRxiv at https://doi.org/10.26434/chemrxiv.15001213/v1. This transfer learning dataset was trained with the 120-experiment dataset from a Bayesian optimization campaign which is also available on ORD (ord_dataset-c703268ea43a4c7e802c6048b6166b34).

name: Transient flow exploration of the effect of temperature, residence time and binary solvent ratios on a uni-molecular allyl substituted catechol reaction.
description: 1,227 datapoints were collected in a series of transient flow ramps involving temperature [175 - 225 C], residence time [2 - 15 minutes] and binary solvent ratios of 24 solvents. HPLC yields reported for starting material and 2 products of the uni-molecular rearrangement of o-Bis(allyloxy)benzene. Reactions performed by SOLVE Chemistry in London (https://www.solvechemistry.com/) and published in https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2506.07619.

name: AIChemEco amide coupling conditions 47k dataset
description: A high-throughput study of amide coupling conditions by AIChemEco from DOI: 10.1039/d5sc03364k. Dataset comprises a diverse set of 70 amines and 66 acids (632 product pairs) coupled under 95 different coupling conditions.

name: Ligand screening for Aza-Heck cyclization in total synthesis of Impatien A
description: 24 ligands are screened for the aza-Heck cyclization in a total synthesis of Impatien A.

name: Fig 7 data from Golden paper
description: Cross-coupling of 3-(1-chloroethyl)pyridine with a range of  nucleophiles. Data from Fig 7 of https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chempr.2024.04.001.

name: Chan-Lam coupling of primary sulfonamides with boronic acids
description: Screen of Chan-Lam couplings of primary sulfonamides with boronic acids, from 10.26434/chemrxiv-2024-22jrq, by the Abigail Doyle group in collaboration with Janssen. Includes a triplicate HTE screen spanning 44 sulfonamides, 2 boronic acids, 4 copper catalysts, 21 bases, and 4 solvents at 60 °C for 18 hours under an air atmosphere.

name: C-H activation of oxazoles from the second demo case in the PyParser paper
description: C-H activation of oxazoles from the second demo case in the PyParser paper.It is also referred to as the "reaction optimization" campaign.Duplicate conditions are found in wells A2/A8, A3/A9, A5/A11 and A6/A12, then again in wells C2/C8, C3/C9, C5/C11 and C6/C12. This duplication was done to ensure reproducibility between the two 24-well metal heating blocks.

name: Cernak miniaturized N-alkylation with BOC deprotection
description: Miniaturized N-alkylation and BOC deprotection. From Time Cernak and Merck publication 10.1038/s44160-023-00351-1. Contains 96 alkylations with in situ BOC deprotection, which are a full factorial combination of 2 secondary amine cores, 12 electrophiles, and 4 bases. A further 8 control reactions (REACTION_TYPE = "BOC deprotection") test the BOC deprotection of the two core reactants in the presence of the 4 bases without electrophiles.

name: Cernak miniaturized reductive amination
description: Miniaturized reductive aminations of staurosporine with aldehydes and ketones. From Time Cernak and Merck publication 10.1038/s44160-023-00351-1. Contains 2 subsets defined by 'experiment set', with 'optimisation' being a screen of 16 aldehydes/ketones and 48 reaction conditions, and 'library synthesis' being a screen of 48 aldehydes and 8 reaction conditions.

name: Cernak miniaturized Suzuki Cross-Coupling 12x10 Informer Library
description: Miniaturized Suzuki cross-coupling of 12 aryl halide cores, with 10 boronic acids/esters, to produce 120 possible products using 12 conditions. From Tim Cernak and Merck publication 10.1038/s44160-023-00351-1. The 12 conditions include 5 palladium Buchwald precatalysts and six solvent/cosolvent/base combinations.

name: Dataset from `Ultra-high-throughput mapping of the chemical space of asymmetric catalysis enables accelerated reaction discovery`
description: Full factorial of the alpha-asymmetric alkylation of aldehydes with photoredox and organocatalysis [10 bromoacetophenones x 13 photocatalysts x 11 organocatalysts, 1430 total reactions]. Enantioselectivity determined by ion mobility mass spectrometry.

name: Minisci dataset from Roche
description: Minisci reactions which were extracted from the literature by Roche scientists and published in the SURF format (ChemRxiv, 2024, DOI: 10.26434/chemrxiv-2023-nfq7h)

name: Borylation dataset from Roche
description: Borylation reactions which were extracted from the literature by Roche scientists and published in the SURF format (ChemRxiv, 2024, DOI: 10.26434/chemrxiv-2023-nfq7h)

name: 39k HTE dataset from Pfizer
description: 39,000 HTE reactions from Pfizer, as reported in DOI .1038\s41557-023-01393-w. Additional data preparation has been performed to record solvents and reagents as components with smiles strings.

name: Aniline amide coupling reaction
description: Amidation reactivities are evaluated with 10 anilines, 8 activators, 4 bases, 3 solvents with a fixed indomethacin carboxylic core.

name: Pd-catalyzed C-H arylation of imidazole with aryl bromide
description: palladium-catalyzed imidazole C5-H arylation reactivities with 8 aryl bromides and 8 imidazoles are evaluated with 24 monophosphine ligands

name: Reizman Suzuki Cross-Coupling
description: Reactions from Reizman, et al. Suzuki–Miyaura cross-coupling optimization enabled by automated feedback. React. Chem. Eng., 2016,1, 658-666; https://doi.org/10.1039/C6RE00153J

name: Reizman Suzuki Cross-Coupling
description: Reactions from Reizman, et al. Suzuki–Miyaura cross-coupling optimization enabled by automated feedback. React. Chem. Eng., 2016,1, 658-666; https://doi.org/10.1039/C6RE00153J

description: Reactions from Reizman, et al. Suzuki–Miyaura cross-coupling optimization enabled by automated feedback. React. Chem. Eng., 2016,1, 658-666; https://doi.org/10.1039/C6RE00153J

description: Reactions from Reizman, et al. Suzuki–Miyaura cross-coupling optimization enabled by automated feedback. React. Chem. Eng., 2016,1, 658-666; https://doi.org/10.1039/C6RE00153J

name: Styrene Mizoroki-Heck
description: Mizoroki-Heck couplings with Ni and Pd, 4 x 96 well-plates, Newman 2023

description: Mizoroki-Heck couplings with Ni and Pd, 4 x 96 well-plates, Newman 2023

description: Mizoroki-Heck couplings with Ni and Pd, 4 x 96 well-plates, Newman 2023

name: HTE Suzuki coupling dataset
description: Pd-catalyzed Suzuki coupling HTE dataset from Figure 2 of doi:10.1021/jacs.2c08592

name: NiCOlit
description: Nickel-catalyzed cross-couplings extracted from organic reaction publications

name: 750 AstraZeneca ELN dataset
description: This dataset includes 750 Buchwald-Hartwig reactions generated from AstraZeneca ELN which is used in yield prediction work: 10.26434/chemrxiv.14589498.v2

name: Electroreductive Coupling of Alkenyl and Benzyl Halides
description: 27-member library of coupling products from figures 2 and 3 of https://pubs.acs.org/doi/abs/10.1021/acscatal.9b01785

name: Nano CN PhotoChemistry Informers Library
description: https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.accounts.0c00760Data from Figure S12. Data from experiment 2. Yields of products calculated by UPLC-MS using product standards.

name: Figure 4 from Chemistry informer libraries
description: Reactions from Kutchukian et al. Chemistry informer libraries: a chemoinformatics enabled approach to evaluate and advance synthetic methods. Chem. Sci., 2016,7, 2604-2613; https://doi.org/10.1039/C5SC04751J

name: Development of an automated kinetic profiling system with online HPLC for reaction optimization
39 compound library from "Building a Sulfonamide Library by Eco-Friendly Flow Synthesis"
Ni-catalyzed Suzuki Miyaura cross-coupling
description: A nickel-catalyzed Suzuki-Miyaura cross-coupling reaction with various aryl chlorides and aryl boronic acids evaluated with phosphine ligands. From https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.abj4213

name: synthesis of islatravir by biocatalytic cascade
description: Reaction from Huffman, et al. Design of an in vitro biocatalytic cascade for the manufacture of islatravir, Science 6 Dec 2019 Vol 366, Issue 6470, pp. 1255-1259; https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aay8484

name: Coupling of α-carboxyl sp3-carbons with aryl halides
Microwave-assisted Biginelli Condensation Dataset
description: 48-member library of Biginelli products from microwave screening paper, https://pubs.acs.org/doi/full/10.1021/cc010044j

name: Imidazopyridines dataset
description: Data form a 3 component reaction approach towards diverse imidazopyridines

name: Shields Arylation
description: Reactions from Shields, B.J., Stevens, J., Li, J. et al. Bayesian reaction optimization as a tool for chemical synthesis. Nature 590, 89–96 (2021). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-021-03213-y

name: Rapid material-sparing screening of 5760 Suzuki-Miyaura coupling reactions
description: 5760 nanoscale flow reactions from https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aap9112 screening a series of electrophiles and nucleophiles against 12 ligands (one blank), 8 bases (one blank), and four solvents.

name: Photodehalogenation_HTE_estimated_conv_at_5hr
description: Ref: Bernhard, S. et al "High-throughput Synthesis and Screening of Iridium(III) Photocatalysts for the Fast and Chemoselective Dehalogenation of Aryl Bromides"  ACS Catal. 2020, 10, 6977−6987. https://dx.doi.org/10.1021/acscatal.0c02247

name: Pd-catalyzed Buchwald-Hartwig C-N cross-coupling
description: A palladium-catalyzed Buchwald-Hartwig cross coupling reaction with different precatalysts with different ligands, and bases.

name: Shields Arylation
description: Reactions from Shields, B.J., Stevens, J., Li, J. et al. Bayesian reaction optimization as a tool for chemical synthesis. Nature 590, 89–96 (2021). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-021-03213-y

name: Pd_CN_Coupling_Informer_Library
description: Ref: Chem. Sci., 2016, 7, 2604.doi: 10.1039/c5sc04751jThis palladium catalyzed C-N cross coupling dataset is the first 8 rows of Figure 4D
